category_title: Disengaged Aboriginal students in an alternative education setting
minimal_context: The student is asked to interview a family member about residential schools for a whole-class assignment in an alternative education classroom.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: For this assignment, I would like you to interview one of your family members about their experiences in residential schools.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: This is stupid. Why do we have to talk about this?

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is the topic we are focusing on right now. Please start writing down some interview questions.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: No. I'm not doing it. It's boring.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We need to complete this project for the class.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Interrupts) I don't care what we need to do. I'm not doing your boring project! (Walks out of the classroom)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: For this assignment, I would like you to interview one of your family members about their experiences in residential schools.

STUDENT: This is stupid. Why do we have to talk about this?

TUTOR: It is the topic we are focusing on right now. Please start writing down some interview questions.

STUDENT: No. I'm not doing it. It's boring.

TUTOR: We need to complete this project for the class.

STUDENT: (Interrupts) I don't care what we need to do. I'm not doing your boring project! (Walks out of the classroom)
